name: SkySlope Real Estate Brokerage Compliance API
what_it_does: SkySlope REST API for real estate brokerage transaction management and compliance platform. Enables AI agents to manage real estate transaction files and document workflows, handle broker compliance review and audit trails, collect e-signatures on contracts and disclosures, access transaction milestone tracking data, manage checklist and compliance requirement tracking, integrate with MLS and CRM systems, retrieve brokerage analytics and production reports, and connect transaction data with commission management and accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing real estate transaction compliance files from brokerage management agents
Tracking document completion and compliance checklists from transaction coordination agents
Accessing audit trail data for broker review from compliance reporting agents
Integrating transaction data with commission systems from brokerage operations agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without residential brokerage compliance focus
Individual agents without brokerage-level compliance tracking
Property management without real estate sales transaction workflows
best_when: A real estate brokerage using SkySlope wants AI agents to automate transaction file management, compliance review, document collection, and brokerage reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Real estate transaction files include sensitive financial and personal data. Broker compliance records have legal implications. Automated document generation must comply with state real estate disclosure and fiduciary requirements.

auth.notes: SkySlope uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Brokerage-level credentials with transaction, document, and compliance scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Partner program for CRM and MLS integrations. Webhooks for real-time transaction events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — brokerage enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-user or per-transaction pricing; enterprise brokerage pricing
pricing.notes: Sacramento, California. Founded 2011. Major real estate brokerage compliance platform. Used by RE/MAX, Coldwell Banker, and other major brokerages. Strong broker compliance focus. Competes with Dotloop (Zillow) and Lone Wolf for transaction management. Also offers DigiSign e-signature product.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Brokerage compliance files contain sensitive financial and personal data
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with developer portal
Compliance checklist automation must maintain broker review requirements — cannot bypass broker sign-off
State-specific disclosure requirements — automated disclosure workflows need state real estate law compliance
E-signature integrity — document modifications after signing break legal binding
Audit trail data is legally required for brokerage compliance — immutable record-keeping
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate brokerage compliance data. SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Legally required audit trails. Broker compliance requirements.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate compliance data. SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. Legally required audit trails.
